example_reviews: Just be honest about your pricing up front. Don't ask me a serious of personal questions, give me no opportunity to evaluate/trial the app, then drop an expensive subscription wall. Give me at least a tiny indication of value before asking for money.
Cool but it's really expensive (probably no regional pricing)

I feel this is a very helpful app . But I think the discovery part should be free to everyone , coz not everyone is capable of paying of course for the treatment not free . But for the knowledge and knowing thr content abt you should be for everyone and free. No offense but it would be better if there is no subscription or payment for knowing the content .
groups.group_summary: Users discuss the costs, subscription models, and value for money of the app.

example_reviews: I would not recommend to patients given numerous technical issues
Cant login in when it says login in. It says no Internet connection but I have Internet connection
If it had a log in option to keep your record up to date and be able to login from different devices that would help a lot , otherwise it is quite good
groups.group_summary: Users report various technical problems, such as login issues, crashes, and data loss.

example_reviews: Really good user experience, it's made journalling my thoughts really pleasant.
Great user experience, I love the app. It's of great help keeping track with my mood & mindset.
Great user experience. I love that this app gently reminds me to keep tabs on my mental well-being, and that it changes up the questions every time.
groups.group_summary: Users share their thoughts on the app's usability, interface, and overall user experience.

example_reviews: mood tracking with reminder. very helpful.
So far has been useful for mood tracking. I like the design a lot.
groups.group_summary: Users discuss the helpfulness of the app's insights, therapy features, and mood tracking capabilities.

example_reviews: This app has facebook as a third party tool, and they do not anonoymise your data for third parties. This is awful and troubling for an app that collect information on your mental health.
Found out this app has Facebook as a third party source, and it doesn't anonymise your data. Uninstalling.
I hope this app doesn't store my data and then sell it for third parties. We give infos about our intellectual feeling so...
groups.group_summary: Users express concerns about data privacy, security, and sharing with third parties.
